'''bathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yearward|yearward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yearward|yearward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bathate|bathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bathatesher|bathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bathatesherĂ«m|bathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bathatero|bathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bathateshĂ«|bathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bathateshĂ«m|bathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibathatero|gokibathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibathateshĂ«|gokibathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibathateshĂ«m|gokibathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobathankerom|gobathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobathankeshĂ«|gobathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobathankeshĂ«m|gobathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobathankeya|gobathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bathaterom|bathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bathatemu|bathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bathateya|bathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibathaterom|gokibathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibathatemu|gokibathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibathateya|gokibathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bathathate|bathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bathathatesher|bathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bathathatesherĂ«m|bathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bathathatero|bathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bathathateshĂ«|bathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bathathateshĂ«m|bathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibathathatero|gokibathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibathathateshĂ«|gokibathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibathathateshĂ«m|gokibathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobathathankerom|gobathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobathathankeshĂ«|gobathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobathathankeshĂ«m|gobathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobathathankeya|gobathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bathathaterom|bathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bathathatemu|bathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bathathateya|bathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibathathaterom|gokibathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibathathatemu|gokibathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibathathateya|gokibathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠthĂŠte|bĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠthĂŠtesher|bĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠthĂŠtero|bĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠthĂŠtero|gokibĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠthĂŠterom|bĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠthĂŠtemu|bĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠthĂŠteya|bĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠthĂŠterom|gokibĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠthĂŠteya|gokibĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafthafte|bafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafthaftesher|bafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafthaftesherĂ«m|bafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafthaftero|bafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafthafteshĂ«|bafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafthafteshĂ«m|bafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafthaftero|gokibafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafthafteshĂ«|gokibafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafthafteshĂ«m|gokibafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafthafnkerom|gobafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafthafnkeshĂ«|gobafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafthafnkeshĂ«m|gobafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafthafnkeya|gobafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafthafterom|bafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafthaftemu|bafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafthafteya|bafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafthafterom|gokibafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafthaftemu|gokibafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafthafteya|gokibafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
